title: EEE-Bench 开放题
rewritten_question_text: In the figure, let a random process \( Y(t) \) be described as \( Y(t) = h(t) * X(t) + Z(t) \), where \( X(t) \) is a white noise process with power spectral density \( S_X(f) = 5 \) W/Hz. The filter \( h(t) \) has a magnitude response given by \( |H(f)| = 0.5 \) for \( -5 \leq f \leq 5 \), and zero elsewhere. \( Z(t) \) is a stationary random process, uncorrelated with \( X(t) \), with power spectral density as shown in the figure. The power in \( Y(t) \), in watts, is equal to ______ W (rounded off to one decimal place).

title: Dataset Open Question
rewritten_question_text: An AC voltage source \(V = 10\sin(t)\) volts is applied to the following network. Assume that \(R_1 = 3k\Omega\), \(R_2 = 6k\Omega\), and \(R_3 = 9k\Omega\), and that the diode is ideal. The RMS current \(I_{rms}\) (in mA) through the diode is _______.

title: Dataset Open Question
rewritten_question_text: Consider the circuit shown. The output of a \(2:1\) MUX is given by the function \(ac^{\prime} + bc\). What is the Boolean function \(f\) in terms of \(x_1\) and \(x_2\)?

title: Dataset Open Question
rewritten_question_text: As shown in the figure, a straight current-carrying conductor is placed directly above the poles of a horseshoe magnet and is free to move. When a current \( I \) flows through the conductor, viewed from above, in which direction does the conductor rotate?

title: Dataset Open Question
rewritten_question_text: As shown in the figure, a straight current-carrying conductor is placed directly above the poles of a horseshoe magnet and is free to move. When a current \( I \) flows through the conductor, does the conductor ascend or descend?

title: Dataset Open Question
rewritten_question_text: In the circuit shown in the figure, the power supply voltage is \( u = 220\sqrt{2} \sin(628t) \, \text{V} \), and the readings of ammeters \( A_1 \), \( A_2 \), and \( A_3 \) are the same. If the power supply voltage is changed to \( u = 220\sqrt{2} \sin(314t) \, \text{V} \), what is the relationship between the readings of ammeters \( A_1 \) and \( A_3 \)?
expected_answer: The reading of \( A_1 \) is twice the reading of \( A_3 \)

title: Dataset Open Question
rewritten_question_text: In the circuit shown in the figure, the relationship between input and output is \( u_o = -\frac{1}{RC} \int u_i \, dt \). What type of operation does this circuit realize?

title: EEE-Bench 开放题
rewritten_question_text: A microwave circuit consisting of lossless transmission lines \(T_1\) and \(T_2\) is shown in the figure. The plot shows the magnitude of the input reflection coefficient \(|\Gamma|\) as a function of frequency \(f\). The phase velocity of the signal in the transmission lines is \(2 \times 10^8\,\text{m/s}\). The length \(L\) (in meters) of \(T_2\) is ______.

title: Dataset Open Question
rewritten_question_text:
\(\mathrm{X}(t)\) is a stationary process with power spectral density \(S_x(f) > 0\) for all \(f\). The process is passed through the system shown in the figure.

Let \(S_y(f)\) be the power spectral density of \(\mathrm{Y}(t)\). For which frequencies \(f\) is \(S_y(f)=0\)? Express your answer in terms of an integer \(n\) and specify \(f_0\).

title: Dataset Open Question
rewritten_question_text: The digital logic shown in the figure satisfies the given state diagram when \(Q_1\) is connected to input A of the XOR gate. Suppose the XOR gate is replaced by an XNOR gate. To preserve the state diagram, what should input A be connected to?

rewritten_question_text: What is the logical expression F corresponding to the logic state table shown in the figure?

title: EEE-Bench 开放题
rewritten_question_text:
For the unity feedback control system, the open-loop transfer function \( G(s) = \frac{2}{s(s+1)} \).
The steady state error \( e_{ss} \) due to a unit step input is ________.

title: EEE-Bench 开放题
rewritten_question_text: Calculate the operating frequency of the following oscillator circuit, if \(C_1 = 0.033 \, \mu F\) and \(L_1 = 175 \, mH\), as shown in the figure. The operating frequency is ______ kHz.

title: EEE-Bench 子题 1
rewritten_question_text:
A single-phase inverter is operated in PWM mode, generating a single pulse of width \(2d\) in the center of each half-cycle as shown in the image. It is found that the output voltage is free from the 5th harmonic for a pulse width of \(144^\circ\). What will be the percentage of the 3rd harmonic present in the output voltage \(\left( \frac{V_{o3}}{V_{o1 \text{max}}} \right)\)?
请只回答第 1 个目标量。

title: Dataset Open Question 1
rewritten_question_text: Let \( x(t) = 2 \cos(800\pi t) + \cos(1400\pi t) \). \( x(t) \) is sampled with the rectangular pulse train shown in the figure. In the sampled signal, what is the lower spectral component (in kHz) present in the frequency range 2.5 kHz to 3.5 kHz?
